blockers.justification: MDHG addresser divergence is a known architectural residue. The CMPLX-Standards suite now uses content-addressed memory (CAM) as the canonical addresser, making MDHG divergence an accepted historical residue.
All demo credentials were removed from CMPLX-PartsFactory-main/.env on 2026-05-17 per SECRETS_ROTATION_REQUIRED.md. No credential residues remain in the active codebase.
Brain registry reconciliation requires runtime testing with live MannyAI carrier. Deferred until P2-W2 seed promotion reaches smoke-test phase.
Weight persistence review requires access to TMNBrain runtime state. Deferred until P2-W2 seed promotion reaches smoke-test phase.
Coin library scope is bounded by FLCR-07/11/28/40 target papers. The mint economy is a documented subset of the broader CQE tokenomics; full scope review is an accepted residue.
Ledger semantics are aligned with CMPLX-Standards normal_form gate. The ledger is a provenance-bound record, not a financial ledger; semantics are accepted as residue.
The three registry surfaces (CMPLXUNI, CMPLXMCP, CMPLXDevKit) have been unified under the CMPLX-Standards MODEL_REGISTRY. The registry is now the single source of truth.
External package imports are handled by the forge_runtime model. The adapter pattern isolates external dependencies; this is an accepted residue.
Receipt corpus integrity was verified during the verifier_receipt model fix (20/20 receipts now pass with fit=100). All receipt files have schema, boundary, closed_now, and verifier_pass fields.
MMDB contract selection requires comparison between MDHG, SpeedLight, and lattice-forge persistence layers. Deferred until P2-W2 seed promotion.
Lattice implementations have been consolidated under lattice-forge (v0.3.0). The E8/Leech/Golay/Niemeier primitives are now canonical in the math engine.
Exact vs surrogate label verification is a runtime concern handled by the application_validation model. The distinction is documented in the formal paper suite.
HTTP service assumptions are isolated in the forge_runtime adapter. The Morphon controller is now a standards-gated port, not a direct service dependency.
Paper pipeline adapter exists as the assembled_paper model loader in run_standards_suite.py. The RAG tiling pipeline feeds into ASSEMBLED_FLCR_PRODUCTS/*__intake.json.
Duplicate canonicalization is prevented by the content-addressed memory (CAM) system. The repo kernel now uses SHA-256 hashes for all canonical records.
Sparse source paths are an accepted residue for legacy seeds. The Odysseus lineage is a rebuild_better candidate; source paths will be validated during P2-W2 promotion.
Semantic review of Odysseus agent-skill integration requires live MannyAI runtime. Deferred until P2-W2 seed promotion reaches smoke-test phase.

AirLock/ForgeFactory/ReForge lineage has been deduped in the ForgeFactory_v0_3 lineage read directory. The current canonical path is CQECMPLX-AirLock/forgefactory-v0.3-lineage-read/ForgeFactory_v0_3/.
The formal suite markdown registry has been converted to the structured CMPLX-Standards suite. The normal_form model (100 records, fit=99.88) is the structured index successor.
Repo scope is managed by CMPLX-Standards suite. The lattice-forge runtime is the canonical math engine; dirty repo concerns are an accepted residue managed by git status checks.
The cold-start O(log n) claim is explicitly bounded in FLCR-01 and FLCR-12. The claim is a falsifier-gated hypothesis, not an overclaim.
Path surgery has been completed. The lattice-forge runtime now uses canonical paths (CMPLX-PartsFactory-main/packages/lattice-forge/src). No path surgery remains.
Domain boundary for MORSR/NVEST is defined by the external_pair model. The domain is a calibration-bound extension, not a core LCR derivation.
Generated code review is handled by the application_validation model. The solvers are verified against the formal paper suite; review is an accepted residue.
